name: Tube Preamp (audio chain v2)
author: KB2UKA
description: Triode-style tube preamp / soft-saturator for the Zeus voice audio chain. Asymmetric tanh transfer (operator-tunable bias point) generates the 2nd-harmonic richness that characterises a vacuum-tube preamp; a 1-pole DC blocker scrubs the static offset, and a post-saturation low-pass shelf (Warmth) trades top-end harshness against air. Realtime managed C#, no native dependency. Live SVG transfer-curve viz, rotary knobs (Drive / Bias / Warmth / Output), bypass header switch, IN / OUT peak meters.
